message:
test(e2e/referral): cover landing + application flow

- fetch live codes via API helpers and verify landing copy, CTA, benefits, and displayed code
- assert CTA ref param propagation for attribution
- validate code acceptance/rejection and case-insensitive behavior via API
- apply referrals for new users; block self/duplicate referrals with error assertions
- exercise invalid-code landings and trust-signal copy
